footer.brandBody: iSounds is Sudan's home for podcasts and video shows — local voices, curated discovery, and premium listening in partnership with Zain.
footer.joinBody: Stay close to new episodes, featured shows, and releases from Sudanese creators.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} iSounds. Built for listeners who love Sudanese audio.

auth.subscribeBody: Enjoy Sudan's premium podcast and video content in partnership with Zain.

auth.listenRequiresSubscription: Subscribe to listen to this episode.

landing.title: Your home for Sudanese podcasts and shows.
landing.subtitle: Discover the latest audio and video episodes, organized by topic and crafted for Arabic-first listeners.

hero.headline: Your home for Sudanese podcasts.
hero.subcopy: Subscribe to our podcast and get access to exclusive content.

cards.audioDescription: Podcasts and stories on the go

cards.oneBody: Browse by category, explore trending episodes, and jump into latest, most liked, and most viewed podcasts.
cards.twoBody: Stream audio in the built-in player, resume where you left off, and enjoy video episodes when available.
cards.threeBody: Unlock premium episodes through Zain Sudan — charged on your line and verified in a few taps.

categories.title: Explore by category
categories.intro: From culture and storytelling to news and entertainment — pick a lane and dive into shows made for Sudanese listeners.

topicCards.filler: Discover more in Explore and find your next favorite show.

interleave-1.headline: Resume where you left off
interleave-1.body: Jump back into the latest episode in any category without losing your place.

fill-1.headline: Discover Sudanese voices
fill-1.body: Fresh episodes land weekly — start with what is trending in your favorite lane.

aboutBento.intro: A Sudan-focused home for podcasts, video shows, and the stories that matter locally.

about.title: About iSounds
about.intro: iSounds is a Sudan-focused audio and video portal built to spotlight local voices, stories, and creators.
about.missionBody: Make high-quality Sudanese spoken content easy to discover, enjoy, and share across mobile and web.

points.discovery: Fresh episode rails across latest, most viewed, and most liked.
points.personalized: Personal tools like search history, ratings, and continue listening.
points.subscription: Subscriber-only premium playback in partnership with Zain.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.intro: Find quick answers about subscriptions, playback, and account access.

subscription.q: How do I subscribe to iSounds?
subscription.a: Use the Subscribe button and complete the flow through Zain. Once active, your account unlocks premium playback.

playback.q: Why can't I play some episodes?
playback.a: Some content is for active subscribers only. If you are subscribed, try refreshing your session or checking your subscription status.

account.q: How do I log in again?
account.a: Open the login page and enter your phone number, or return through your carrier redirect link to restore access.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using iSounds, you agree to these terms and all applicable carrier billing rules.
terms.usageBody: Use iSounds for personal, non-commercial listening and viewing. Misuse, unauthorized scraping, or abusive behavior may lead to access restrictions.
terms.subscriptionBody: Subscriber content requires an active plan processed through Zain. Charges, renewal, and cancellation are governed by your provider terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We handle only the data needed to deliver playback, subscription checks, and product improvements.
privacy.dataBody: This may include account/session identifiers, playback activity, search history, ratings, and support submissions.
privacy.rightsBody: You can request support through the contact page and manage subscription state through available account actions.

pwa.installTitle: Install iSounds on your home screen
pwa.installBody: Faster launch, offline access, and a full app-like experience.
